title: AED Retrieval And Use Prep
summary: Use when the user needs help locating an AED and preparing to use it during suspected cardiac arrest.

confirm_someone_is_calling_emergency_ser.speak_before: Confirm that someone is calling emergency services right now.
confirm_someone_is_calling_emergency_ser.agent_hint: Do not start scene-search guidance until emergency services have been addressed.

ask_a_bystander_to_bring_the_nearest_aed.speak_before: Ask a nearby bystander to bring the nearest AED immediately.
ask_a_bystander_to_bring_the_nearest_aed.agent_hint: If no bystander is available, tell the wearer they may need to move the camera to search the scene.

use_scene_understanding_to_help_locate_a.speak_before: Slowly pan the camera across the room and nearby walls so I can look for an AED or cabinet.
use_scene_understanding_to_help_locate_a.agent_hint: Use a spatial tool to look for a visible AED, defibrillator cabinet, or emergency equipment location hint. If none is visible, say that clearly and ask for a wider scan.
use_scene_understanding_to_help_locate_a.tool_prompt: Search the current scene for a visible AED, defibrillator case, emergency cabinet, or strong candidate that likely contains an AED. Return labeled boxes and uncertainty if nothing is clearly visible.
use_scene_understanding_to_help_locate_a.advance_when: the spatial tool identifies a likely AED location or the agent says no AED is visible yet

keep_cpr_going_while_another_person_gets.speak_before: Keep CPR going while another person retrieves the AED.
keep_cpr_going_while_another_person_gets.agent_hint: Remind the wearer not to stop compressions unnecessarily.

turn_on_the_aed_as_soon_as_it_arrives_an.speak_before: Turn on the AED as soon as it arrives and follow its voice prompts.
turn_on_the_aed_as_soon_as_it_arrives_an.agent_hint: Keep this instruction short and procedural.

resume_cpr_immediately_after_a_shock_or_.speak_before: Resume CPR immediately after a shock or if the AED says no shock is advised.
resume_cpr_immediately_after_a_shock_or_.agent_hint: Use this as the final reinforcement step.
